who: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR, processing 5-15 new hires/month
offer: For HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR, processing 5-15 new hires/month, inefficient onboarding causes delays in new hire integration. We streamline the onboarding workflow instead of manual processes with multiple tools.
problem: Inefficient onboarding process leading to delays in new hire integration.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where HR coordinators seek advice
Indie Hackers discussions on onboarding tools
DM outreach to HR coordinators with demo video
Engage in community forums for HR coordinators
try_it: Let users try centralized paperwork collection on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of the onboarding process
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
Reduce steps in the onboarding process
